title: Cistanthe picta
taxonomy: Cistanthe picta is a species of flowering plant in the family Portulacaceae. It is native to Chile and Argentina. The classification of Cistanthe picta is within the genus Cistanthe, which was formerly classified under the genus Calandrinia. Cistanthe picta is a member of the order Caryophyllales and the clade Asterids. This classification is based on its morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics.
